item.title: Is A.I. Art Stealing from Artists?
item.description: According to the lawyer behind a new class-action suit, every image that a generative tool produces “is an infringing, derivative work.” https://www.newyorker.com/culture/infinite-scroll/is-ai-art-stealing-from-artists #the_more_you_know
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: Union pays off
item.description: UPS worker here, that potential strike that was all over the news? It got me a 50% pay increase so now I'm solidly middle class, and will be able to actually take vacations soon. Don't care about upvotes, just wanted to celebrate with a crappily made meme. (originally posted by @Nagant on 2023-07-31 23:10:02)

item.dc:creator: iceage2012

item.title: Mistakes have been made
item.description: I decided to add some fresh jalapeños to my pasta tonight just for fun because i love all things spicy. I forgot to wash my hands before grabbing my purple friend from my bedside drawer much later in the night..... My va Jay Jay is burning something fierce right now. The hawk Tua was not kind to me this evening. Mistakes were made and I'm in so much pain. Pray for me friends. UPDATE!! It's been over 12 hours and the coochie feels fine now. I have washed my hands several times... and it still burns if I rub my eye. This is wild. Thank you to everyone for your kind suggestions and witty comments. It made this experience slightly less traumatizing.
item.dc:creator: JessicaRabbitWhoCollectsBadHabits

item.title: It's been 2 years
item.description:
It's been 2 years since the abusive ex-wife left. Was insanity for the first year - dog got cancer, friends left, few other relationships imploded, lost my home in the divorce...
I used to sit in my car crying, trying to decide if I wanted to go inside when I lived with her. I couldn't leave my dog behind - Opal was in her name. We were letting a friend of hers live in the guest room to get on his feet and it felt like she gave him all the energy she had, and I got what's left. When she was in a bad mood she'd yell at me, when she was in a good mood she'd ignore me.
I got screamed at because I bought new underwear and socks. Spent money on a haircut. And then she left. But through it all, my support network stepped up and carried me through when I couldn't go on. My friend Katie was there in the time it took her to put on her shoes. My brother was in such a hurry to stay with me he forgot to pack underwear. My parents drove me to the courthouse to make sure I could get through the day. Peggy and Michael opened their home for a year to help me figure my next steps out.
And most of all, my little lamp was right there with me.
She is a good girl. Sometimes she does dumb things, and she likes to think with her mouth, but she is my little girl. And my little trail hound is slowing down, arthritis is starting to set in. But the vet takes good care of her and I've been known to dote.
Remember that your friends are your friends because they like you. My friends *actually want to spend time with me*. Weird, I know.
So to celebrate, I've bought a pair of lightsabers. Opal and I are having Roy Rogers roast beef sandwiches for dinner, I'm going to spend my evening drinking a responsible amount of whiskey and reading my friends and their kids Howl's Moving Castle on Youtube (look for Uncle Navi Reads if you need a bedtime story).
Get some rest, and do your best to become someone you can be proud of. And if people can hate you without knowing you, I can love you. Be safe.
item.dc:creator: DerFoxeh

item.title: The ride through the pipe was crazy, but the way he left his board at the end and just flew was legendary
item.dc:creator: Zergcollective

item.title: Reformed memes pt. 36
item.description:
Me pulling up
When she's been fucking around with magik
Me currently in Canada
The series we truly need
It ain't easy being so sexy..
Remember to quickly grab them before they get away
Gonna tell my future kids this is part of the scriptures
2000 a month plus you have to add them to the lease
Walk the arena holding hands ;(
How do I exchange my internet points?! Front page edit: is poutine struggle food? Who's idea was potato flour fat and cheese?? Who was struggling?! Canada are you ok?!?!
